system.Text:
__When you rest and recover at an improvised, temporary, or make-shift refuge__, roll +supply.

On a __strong hit__, your provisions are enough to adequately sustain you, your allies, and your special companions; each may choose one.

*    @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} and take an automatic strong hit.
*    @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten} and take an automatic strong hit.
*    @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair} and take an automatic strong hit (in the field or underway).

On a __weak hit__, as above, but resources or time are wasted; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1) or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2).

On a __miss__, you take no respite. @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.

Trigger.Text: When you rest and recover at an improvised, temporary, or make-shift refuge, roll +supply.

Strong Hit.Text:
On a __strong hit__, your provisions are enough to adequately sustain you, your allies, and your special companions; each may choose one.

*    @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.2051538f0c9d5d27]{Heal} and take an automatic strong hit.
*    @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.c2c2f31f564caa06]{Hearten} and take an automatic strong hit.
*    @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.eece9a67d1961f70]{Repair} and take an automatic strong hit (in the field or underway).

Weak Hit.Text: On a __weak hit__, as above, but resources or time are wasted; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0fcfea7696d1de15]{Sacrifice Resources} (-1) or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.93d2d69b7e2b85e1]{Lose Momentum} (-2).

Miss.Text: On a __miss__, you take no respite. @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.78baa51694fe37c5]{Pay the Price}.
